title: draba bornmuelleri
intro: Draba bornmuelleri, also known as Bornmueller's whitlowgrass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, derived from its chemical constituents such as isothiocyanates. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and potentially aiding in the treatment of certain diseases. In terms of herbal preparations, Draba bornmuelleri is typically used as an infusion or tincture, where it is steeped in hot water or a solvent to extract its active compounds.
